message:
feat(doctor): add logging quality governance contract and validators

Bead asupersync-2b4jj.6.7: Track 6 logging-quality observability

- New governance doc (docs/doctor_logging_quality_governance.md) defining
  log completeness, schema compliance, trace-correlation integrity, and
  structured-log format requirements for the doctor subsystem
- Comprehensive test suite (tests/doctor_logging_quality_validators.rs,
  1439 lines) validating log event schemas, trace correlation chains,
  severity level distributions, and observability assertions
- Test fixtures (tests/fixtures/doctor_logging_quality/) with canonical
  log_quality_rules.json and sample_event_stream.json for deterministic
  validation of logging contracts

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,98 @@
+# doctor Logging-Quality Governance
+
+Bead: `asupersync-2b4jj.6.7`
+
+## Purpose
+
+Define how new logging-quality rules are introduced, modified, or retired
+without destabilizing established diagnostics quality gates.
+
+## Rule Lifecycle
+
+### Introduction
+
+1. New rules must be proposed with a rule ID (`LQ-{CATEGORY}-{SEQ}`), severity,
+   description, and at least one golden test case demonstrating violation detection.
+2. Categories: `ENV` (envelope), `COR` (correlation), `TAX` (taxonomy).
+3. New rules start at `warning` severity for one release cycle, then may be
+   promoted to `error` if no false-positive reports are filed.
+4. The fixture `tests/fixtures/doctor_logging_quality/log_quality_rules.json`
+   is the canonical rule registry.
+
+### Modification
+
+1. Changing a rule's severity from `warning` to `error` requires:
+   - Zero false-positive reports in the prior release cycle.
+   - At least one golden test covering the promoted rule.
+2. Relaxing a rule (error -> warning) requires a comment in the fixture's
+   change log explaining the rationale.
+3. Format-rule changes (e.g., regex patterns) require updating all affected
+   golden fixtures and re-running the full validator suite.
+
+### Retirement
+
+1. Rules may be retired by moving them to a `retired_rules` section in the
+   fixture with an expiry date and reason.
+2. Retired rules must remain in the fixture for at least one release cycle
+   for audit traceability.
+
+## Suppression Policy
+
+1. Known-benign violations may be suppressed via `suppression_entries` in the
+   rule fixture.
+2. Every suppression must include:
+   - `suppression_id`: unique identifier.
+   - `rule_id`: the rule being suppressed.
+   - `reason`: human-readable justification.
+   - `scope`: flow/scenario constraint limiting the suppression.
+   - `expires`: date after which the suppression is invalid.
+3. Maximum 10 active suppressions at any time.
+4. Suppressions must be reviewed every 30 days; expired suppressions must be
+   removed or renewed with updated justification.
+5. Suppressed violations score 0 deduction (do not lower quality score).
+
+## Quality Scoring
+
+- **Max score**: 100
+- **Error violation**: -10 points each
+- **Warning violation**: -3 points each
+- **Suppressed violation**: 0 points
+- **Pass threshold**: >= 80
+- **Warn threshold**: >= 60
+- **Fail**: < 60
+
+## Severity Classification
+
+Severity levels in ascending order: `info`, `warning`, `error`, `critical`.
+
+Default severity by outcome class:
+- `success` -> `info`
+- `cancelled` -> `warning`
+- `failed` -> `error`
+
+Conflict escalation (e.g., flow/event mismatch) always escalates to `critical`.
+
+## Determinism Invariants
+
+1. Validator output must be deterministic: same input -> same violations list.
+2. Violation lists are sorted by `(event_index, rule_id)`.
+3. Quality score computation is pure: `max_score - sum(deductions)`.
+
+## CI Integration
+
+Validation commands:
+
+```bash
+rch exec -- cargo test --test doctor_logging_quality_validators -- --nocapture
+rch exec -- cargo check --all-targets
+rch exec -- cargo clippy --all-targets -- -D warnings
+cargo fmt --check
+```
+
+## Cross-References
+
+- `docs/doctor_logging_contract.md` — baseline structured logging contract
+- `docs/doctor_observability_taxonomy.md` — advanced observability layer
+- `docs/doctor_performance_budget_contract.md` — performance budget gates
+- `tests/fixtures/doctor_logging_quality/log_quality_rules.json` — canonical rules
+- `tests/fixtures/doctor_logging_quality/sample_event_stream.json` — golden stream

@@ -0,0 +1,145 @@
+{
+  "schema_version": "doctor-log-quality-rules-v1",
+  "description": "Logging-quality validator rules for doctor_asupersync structured events",
+  "bead_id": "asupersync-2b4jj.6.7",
+  "baseline_contract_version": "doctor-logging-v1",
+  "observability_contract_version": "doctor-observability-v1",
+  "envelope_rules": [
+    {
+      "rule_id": "LQ-ENV-01",
+      "field": "contract_version",
+      "constraint": "exact_match",
+      "expected": "doctor-logging-v1",
+      "severity": "error",
+      "description": "Contract version must be exactly doctor-logging-v1"
+    },
+    {
+      "rule_id": "LQ-ENV-02",
+      "field": "flow_id",
+      "constraint": "one_of",
+      "expected": ["execution", "replay", "remediation", "integration"],
+      "severity": "error",
+      "description": "Flow ID must be one of the four core flows"
+    },
+    {
+      "rule_id": "LQ-ENV-03",
+      "field": "outcome_class",
+      "constraint": "one_of",
+      "expected": ["cancelled", "failed", "success"],
+      "severity": "error",
+      "description": "Outcome class must be one of the three canonical outcomes"
+    },
+    {
+      "rule_id": "LQ-ENV-04",
+      "field": "run_id",
+      "constraint": "regex",
+      "expected": "^run-[a-z0-9._:/-]+$",
+      "severity": "error",
+      "description": "Run ID must match run- prefix format"
+    },
+    {
+      "rule_id": "LQ-ENV-05",
+      "field": "scenario_id",
+      "constraint": "regex",
+      "expected": "^[a-z0-9._:/-]+$",
+      "severity": "error",
+      "description": "Scenario ID must match slug format"
+    },
+    {
+      "rule_id": "LQ-ENV-06",
+      "field": "trace_id",
+      "constraint": "regex",
+      "expected": "^trace-[a-z0-9._:/-]+$",
+      "severity": "error",
+      "description": "Trace ID must match trace- prefix format"
+    },
+    {
+      "rule_id": "LQ-ENV-07",
+      "field": "artifact_pointer",
+      "constraint": "non_empty",
+      "severity": "warning",
+      "description": "Artifact pointer should be non-empty for traceability"
+    },
+    {
+      "rule_id": "LQ-ENV-08",
+      "field": "command_provenance",
+      "constraint": "non_empty",
+      "severity": "warning",
+      "description": "Command provenance should be non-empty for replay"
+    }
+  ],
+  "correlation_rules": [
+    {
+      "rule_id": "LQ-COR-01",
+      "description": "All events in a stream must share the same run_id",
+      "scope": "stream",
+      "severity": "error"
+    },
+    {
+      "rule_id": "LQ-COR-02",
+      "description": "trace_id must be unique per event within a stream",
+      "scope": "stream",
+      "severity": "error"
+    },
+    {
+      "rule_id": "LQ-COR-03",
+      "description": "Events must be ordered by (flow_id, event_kind, trace_id) lexically",
+      "scope": "stream",
+      "severity": "error"
+    }
+  ],
+  "taxonomy_rules": [
+    {
+      "rule_id": "LQ-TAX-01",
+      "description": "event_kind must be a member of the flow's event_kinds list",
+      "severity": "error"
+    },
+    {
+      "rule_id": "LQ-TAX-02",
+      "description": "Fields declared in flow required_fields must all be present",
+      "severity": "error"
+    },
+    {
+      "rule_id": "LQ-TAX-03",
+      "description": "No unknown fields outside required + optional for a flow",
+      "severity": "warning"
+    }
+  ],
+  "severity_classification": {
+    "levels": ["info", "warning", "error", "critical"],
+    "escalation_order": ["info", "warning", "error", "critical"],
+    "outcome_defaults": {
+      "success": "info",
+      "cancelled": "warning",
+      "failed": "error"
+    },
+    "conflict_escalation": "critical"
+  },
+  "suppression_policy": {
+    "description": "Rules for suppressing known-benign violations in CI",
+    "suppression_entries": [
+      {
+        "suppression_id": "SUP-001",
+        "rule_id": "LQ-ENV-07",
+        "reason": "Artifact pointer may be empty for dry-run replay events",
+        "scope": "flow_id=replay",
+        "expires": "2026-06-01"
+      }
+    ],
+    "governance": {
+      "max_suppressions": 10,
+      "review_cadence_days": 30,
+      "expiry_required": true
+    }
+  },
+  "quality_scoring": {
+    "max_score": 100,
+    "deductions": {
+      "error_violation": 10,
+      "warning_violation": 3,
+      "suppressed_violation": 0
+    },
+    "pass_threshold": 80,
+    "warn_threshold": 60
+  }
+}

@@ -0,0 +1,118 @@
+{
+  "schema_version": "doctor-log-quality-event-stream-v1",
+  "description": "Golden event stream for logging-quality validator tests",
+  "bead_id": "asupersync-2b4jj.6.7",
+  "run_id": "run-golden-lq-001",
+  "events": [
+    {
+      "contract_version": "doctor-logging-v1",
+      "flow_id": "execution",
+      "event_kind": "gate_complete",
+      "outcome_class": "success",
+      "run_id": "run-golden-lq-001",
+      "scenario_id": "lq-scan-baseline",
+      "trace_id": "trace-exec-gate-complete-001",
+      "artifact_pointer": "artifacts/scan_output.json",
+      "command_provenance": "cargo test --lib scan_module -- --nocapture",
+      "fields": {
+        "gate_name": "compile_check",
+        "stage": "complete",
+        "duration_ms": "42"
+      }
+    },
+    {
+      "contract_version": "doctor-logging-v1",
+      "flow_id": "execution",
+      "event_kind": "gate_start",
+      "outcome_class": "success",
+      "run_id": "run-golden-lq-001",
+      "scenario_id": "lq-scan-baseline",
+      "trace_id": "trace-exec-gate-start-002",
+      "artifact_pointer": "artifacts/scan_output.json",
+      "command_provenance": "cargo test --lib scan_module -- --nocapture",
+      "fields": {
+        "gate_name": "compile_check",
+        "stage": "pre_flight"
+      }
+    },
+    {
+      "contract_version": "doctor-logging-v1",
+      "flow_id": "integration",
+      "event_kind": "adapter_sync",
+      "outcome_class": "success",
+      "run_id": "run-golden-lq-001",
+      "scenario_id": "lq-adapter-baseline",
+      "trace_id": "trace-integ-adapter-003",
+      "artifact_pointer": "artifacts/adapter_sync.json",
+      "command_provenance": "asupersync doctor integration-sync",
+      "fields": {
+        "adapter_name": "beads",
+        "sync_direction": "push"
+      }
+    },
+    {
+      "contract_version": "doctor-logging-v1",
+      "flow_id": "remediation",
+      "event_kind": "fix_applied",
+      "outcome_class": "success",
+      "run_id": "run-golden-lq-001",
+      "scenario_id": "lq-remediation-baseline",
+      "trace_id": "trace-remed-fix-004",
+      "artifact_pointer": "artifacts/remediation_log.json",
+      "command_provenance": "asupersync doctor remediate --target lock_ordering",
+      "fields": {
+        "fix_id": "lock-order-001",
+        "rollback_available": "true"
+      }
+    },
+    {
+      "contract_version": "doctor-logging-v1",
+      "flow_id": "replay",
+      "event_kind": "replay_complete",
+      "outcome_class": "cancelled",
+      "run_id": "run-golden-lq-001",
+      "scenario_id": "lq-replay-baseline",
+      "trace_id": "trace-replay-complete-005",
+      "artifact_pointer": "",
+      "command_provenance": "asupersync doctor replay --seed 42",
+      "fields": {
+        "seed": "42",
+        "deterministic": "true",
+        "cancel_reason": "timeout_exceeded"
+      }
+    },
+    {
+      "contract_version": "doctor-logging-v1",
+      "flow_id": "replay",
+      "event_kind": "replay_start",
+      "outcome_class": "success",
+      "run_id": "run-golden-lq-001",
+      "scenario_id": "lq-replay-baseline",
+      "trace_id": "trace-replay-start-006",
+      "artifact_pointer": "",
+      "command_provenance": "asupersync doctor replay --seed 42",
+      "fields": {
+        "seed": "42",
+        "deterministic": "true"
+      }
+    }
+  ],
+  "expected_violations": [
+    {
+      "event_index": 4,
+      "rule_id": "LQ-ENV-07",
+      "field": "artifact_pointer",
+      "severity": "warning",
+      "suppressed_by": "SUP-001"
+    },
+    {
+      "event_index": 5,
+      "rule_id": "LQ-ENV-07",
+      "field": "artifact_pointer",
+      "severity": "warning",
+      "suppressed_by": "SUP-001"
+    }
+  ],
+  "expected_quality_score": 100,
+  "expected_quality_gate": "pass"
+}
